name: Wolves in the Chetwood
rewards: wolf-pelts; the east road made quiet
flavorIntro: Yellow eyes ring the firelight. The pack has trailed the band since dusk, and hunger has made them bold.
designNote: Onramp rung 2 (Design B, swarm). ~20-min grind through a wolf-pack. Asks TWO questions: sustain (drain) AND whether the Warden can hold the line so the Keeper survives the wolf-lunges (spikes). Validated at party Lv3 @ 5000 runs: Lv3 food (~7 HP/s) 6%, Lv4 food (~10 HP/s) 81%, Lv6 food (~11 HP/s) 91%, Lv7 food (~12 HP/s) 98%, Lv8 food (~15 HP/s) ~100%. Needs max Hearthkeeper food (Lv4) for a real chance. physMit stays 0 — armor is a LATER rung's question.
